name: AI COO — Payment Received → Kickoff

trigger.description: Fires when an opportunity is manually moved to Closed Won after payment is received

config.subject: Welcome to AI COO — here's your onboarding form
config.body:
Hey {{contact.firstName}},

Payment confirmed — welcome to AI COO System.

To get started, please fill out this onboarding form. It takes about 10 minutes and gives us everything we need to build your system:

{{ONBOARDING_FORM_LINK}}

Once submitted, we'll begin your installation. You'll have a live system within 7 days.

Any questions before then — just reply here.

— {{SENDER_NAME}}

config.title: Begin AI COO install for {{contact.firstName}} {{contact.lastName}} — due in 3 days

notes: This is the most important workflow — it starts the clock on the 7-day delivery promise. Step 5 creates a high-priority task so you don't miss it. Step 6 moves them out of the sales pipeline and into the delivery pipeline so you can track install status separately from new leads.
